items.purpose: Construct a DataFrame from a dict or list.
Creates a DataFrame from a dictionary with optional orientation control.
Converts a structured array, sequence of tuples, or dicts into a DataFrame.
Creates a one-dimensional labeled array capable of holding any data type.
Returns a fixed frequency DatetimeIndex for time-series indexing.
Creates an immutable one-dimensional array used as an axis label.
Creates a multi-level or hierarchical index from a set of arrays.
Reads a comma-separated values file into a DataFrame.
Reads an Excel file into a DataFrame.
Reads a JSON file or string into a DataFrame.
Writes a DataFrame to a comma-separated values file.
Reads a Parquet file into a DataFrame.
Writes a DataFrame to an Excel file.
Returns the first n rows of the DataFrame.
Returns the last n rows of the DataFrame.
Prints a concise summary of the DataFrame including memory usage.
Generates descriptive statistics for numeric columns.
Returns the data types of each column.
Returns the frequency of unique values in a Series.
Returns a tuple representing the dimensions of the DataFrame.
Accesses a group of rows and columns by label(s).
Accesses a group of rows and columns by integer position(s).
Selects a single column as a Series.
Filters rows using a boolean expression string.
Selects rows where the boolean condition is True.
Accesses a single scalar value by label.
Accesses a single scalar value by integer position.
Removes rows or columns containing missing values.
Fills missing values with a specified value or strategy.
Removes duplicate rows from the DataFrame.
Casts the DataFrame or a column to a specified data type.
Renames columns or index labels using a mapper.
Removes rows or columns by label from the DataFrame.
Splits the DataFrame into groups based on a column or mapping.
Applies one or more aggregation functions across columns.
Creates a spreadsheet-style pivot table from the DataFrame.
Merges two DataFrames using a database-style join.
Concatenates pandas objects along a particular axis.
Resamples time-series data to a regular frequency.
Applies a function along an axis of the DataFrame.
Applies a function element-wise to each value in the DataFrame.
Applies a function element-wise to each value in the DataFrame.
Tests whether each string element contains a pattern.
Replaces occurrences of a pattern with a replacement string.
Splits each string element around a delimiter into a list.
